title: Design canvas hook with CanvasKit initialization and rendering
purpose: Manages the initialization and rendering of a Skia-based design canvas using CanvasKit WASM, handling WebGL surface creation, RAF-batched rendering, and canvas resize events.

steps.content: Initialize references for canvas, renderer, and animation frames.
Subscribe to store state changes that affect rendering.
Set up the render function that updates renderer properties and calls render.
Schedule rendering when store state changes.
Initialize CanvasKit WASM and create WebGL surface on mount.
Set up resize observer to handle canvas resizing.
Return canvas reference, loading state, error state, and hit test functions.
Get the current renderer and canvas references.
IF either reference is missing, exit early.
Update renderer properties with current store state values.
Call the renderer's render method with scene graph and state.
IF a render is already scheduled, exit early.
Schedule a render on the next animation frame.
Execute the render function after the animation frame.
Get the canvas reference and check if it exists or if component is destroyed.
IF canvas is missing or component is destroyed, exit early.
Load CanvasKit WASM asynchronously.
IF component is destroyed after loading, exit early.
Wait one animation frame for layout to settle.
IF component is destroyed after waiting, exit early.
Set canvas dimensions based on client width and device pixel ratio.
Create a WebGL surface using CanvasKit.
IF surface creation fails, set error and loading state.
Create a new SkiaRenderer with CanvasKit and surface.
Initialize editor references with CanvasKit and renderer.
Load fonts for the renderer and trigger initial render.
Mark loading as complete after initialization.
Get the current renderer and canvas references.
IF either reference is missing, exit early.
Update renderer properties with current store state values.
Call the renderer's render method with scene graph and state.
IF renderer is not ready or resize is already scheduled, exit early.
Schedule a resize operation on the next animation frame.
Recreate the WebGL surface at the new canvas dimensions.
IF surface creation fails, set error state.
Create a new SkiaRenderer with the new surface.
Initialize editor references with new CanvasKit and renderer.
Load fonts for the new renderer and trigger render.
Get the scene graph from editor references.
IF renderer exists, perform hit test for section title.
ELSE return null.
Get the scene graph from editor references.
IF renderer exists, perform hit test for component label.
ELSE return null.
